title: solanum nigrum subsp. schultesii
intro: Solanum nigrum subsp. schultesii, also known as black nightshade, is a subspecies of the black nightshade plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the Solanaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Solanum nigrum subsp. schultesii include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and improving digestion, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make medicinal remedies or as a dietary supplement.
